description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Migrate the database layer from Oracle Database to Azure Database for PostgreSQL
tasks.reason: The application currently uses Oracle Database with Oracle-specific JDBC driver, SQL dialect, and configuration. Migrating to Azure Database for PostgreSQL provides a fully managed, cloud-native database service that reduces licensing costs and aligns with the Azure modernization strategy.
tasks.requirements: Migrate the application database layer from Oracle to Azure Database for PostgreSQL. Replace the Oracle JDBC driver (ojdbc8) with the PostgreSQL JDBC driver. Update datasource configuration in application.properties and application-docker.properties to use PostgreSQL connection settings. Convert any Oracle-specific SQL syntax, sequences, or data types to PostgreSQL equivalents. Replace Oracle Hibernate dialect with PostgreSQL dialect.

tasks.description: Enable Azure Managed Identity authentication for the Azure Database for PostgreSQL connection
tasks.reason: The application currently uses hardcoded username and password credentials in application.properties and application-docker.properties for database authentication. Per organisational security policy, sensitive credentials must not be stored in source code or configuration files. Managed Identity provides passwordless authentication without any secrets to manage.
tasks.requirements: Migrate the PostgreSQL datasource authentication from password-based credentials to Azure Managed Identity. Remove hardcoded database passwords from all configuration files. Update Spring Cloud Azure dependencies to support passwordless authentication for Azure Database for PostgreSQL.
